name: @xpert-ai/plugin-canvas
description: Canvas app plugin for agent-managed tldraw infinite canvases, image holders, annotation workflows, reviewable versions, and an editable workbench.
author: XpertAI

interface.longDescription: Create, update, version, review, annotate, insert images, import, and export Agent-managed tldraw infinite canvases. The plugin includes an installable Xpert skill, Assistant template, middleware tools, and a Canvas Workbench for human review.
defaultPrompt: Open a new visual canvas for planning this project.
Create AI image slots on a canvas for these product concepts.
Insert this generated image into the selected Canvas image holder.

description.en_US: Skill for using Canvas middleware tools, Workbench selection context, tldraw snapshot inspection, record patching, image insertion, versioning, and recovery.
description.zh_Hans: 使用 Canvas 中间件工具、工作台选择上下文、tldraw 快照检查、记录修补、图片插入、版本管理和恢复的技能。

description.en_US: Assistant template for Canvas visual workflows.
description.zh_Hans: 面向 Canvas 可视化工作流的助手模板。

description.en_US: Use Canvas Assistant with Workbench and Agent middleware tools for tldraw canvases.
description.zh_Hans: 结合工作台和 Agent 中间件工具使用 Canvas Assistant 管理 tldraw 画布。

description.en_US: Create reviewable infinite canvases and visual planning boards.
description.zh_Hans: 创建可审核的无限画布和可视化规划看板。

description.en_US: Checkpoint authoritative Canvas state, staged record patches, image insertions, and Workbench edits.
description.zh_Hans: 保存权威 Canvas 状态检查点、阶段记录补丁、图片插入和工作台编辑。

description.en_US: Open the Canvas Workbench to inspect, annotate, import, export, and manually edit canvases.
description.zh_Hans: 打开 Canvas 工作台，检查、标注、导入导出并手动编辑画布。

description.en_US: Publish, copy, update, and revoke read-only Canvas Artifact links from the human Workbench.
description.zh_Hans: 在人工工作台中发布、复制、更新和撤销只读 Canvas Artifact 链接。

description.en_US: Workbench view for tldraw canvas editing, AI image holders, annotations, Artifact sharing, versions, and logs.
description.zh_Hans: 用于编辑 tldraw 画布、AI 图片占位、标注、Artifact 分享、版本和日志的工作台视图。

description.en_US: Assistant middleware tools for metadata-only creation, simplified staged shape creation, targeted record patches, progressive reads, image insertion, and failure reporting. Versions remain human-controlled.
description.zh_Hans: 用于仅创建元数据、简化 Shape 分阶段创建、定向记录补丁、渐进查询、图片插入和失败上报的助手中间件工具；版本仅由人工创建。
